post.summary: Upload an image for a product
post.description: Accepts an image file and attaches it to the specified product.

404.description: Product with the specified ID not found

422.description: Validation error (e.g., file too large or invalid format)

get.description: Returns a flat list of all store categories, sorted alphabetically.

post.description: Creates a new category in the catalog. Requires admin privileges.

get.description: Returns the details of a single category.

put.description: Updates an existing category. Requires admin privileges.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: ID of the category to update

delete.description: Deletes a specific category. Requires admin privileges.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: ID of the category to delete

get.summary: Get a list of products (with filtering and pagination)
get.description: Returns a list of only available products. Supports filtering by category, price range, and search by name.

post.summary: Create a new product (Managers and Admins only)
post.description: Creates a new product in the catalog. Requires edit-catalog permissions.

get.description: Returns detailed information about a single product.

put.summary: Update a specific product (Managers and Admins only)
put.description: Updates an existing product. Requires edit-catalog permissions.

delete.description: Permanently deletes or soft-deletes a product from the database.

post.description: Request email and password, return user-object and token

get.description: Verifies the user's email using the token provided in the registration email. On success, it returns the user object and an access token.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Unique verification token sent to the user's email

message.example: The link is expired or invalid. Please register again.

post.description: Request email and password, return user-object and token
Sends a new email verification link to the authenticated user.

429.description: Too Many Requests (rate limit exceeded for sending emails)

get.description: Returns the profile details of the currently authenticated user based on the provided Bearer token.

post.description: Process the active session cart and generate a payment URL for the chosen gateway. Requires active session with items in the cart.
Process incoming webhooks from payment providers like Stripe or Paddle. Validates the signature and updates order status.

200.description: Webhook processed successfully or ignored (e.g., irrelevant event type)
